title: Massive MMO
description: A fantasy MMO-style modpack featuring RPG progression, unique classes, skill leveling, dungeons, bosses, and an open-world adventure experience. Designed for cooperative multiplayer with performance upgrades for smooth gameplay.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8919bde19e4b9aa6bcad39e37eb5c904c9e46a2e.png)

Massive MMO is a modpack that introduces an MMO-style experience to Minecraft. It includes Dungeons and Taverns and several mechanics mods inspired by online RPGs, such as exploration-focused progression, new structures, and more dynamic gameplay.
